title: Ornithopteris nipeensis
taxonomy: Ornithopteris nipeensis is classified as a species of fern within the family Matoniaceae. This species is native to Hawaii, and its classification as a fern is due to its vascular tissues and leaf-like fronds. Ornithopteris nipeensis is a rare and endangered species, with its classification playing a crucial role in conservation efforts. The classification of Ornithopteris nipeensis as a Matoniaceae places it within the larger group of ferns known as euphyllophytes. As a member of Matoniaceae, Ornithopteris nipeensis shares characteristics with other species within this family, such as its unique leaf morphology.
